request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our civil defense systems are woefully unprepared for modern cyber threats? While politicians debate funding, AI-driven attacks are evolving faster than our defenses. Just last year, a small-town emergency alert system was hacked to spread panic. We need proactive investment in civil defense tech now, before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #CyberDefense
